candidate_summary: Pre-voyage compile e_chart embedding studied once at inference start then sparse-accessed; K=4 ocean-swell tier hierarchy + island-shell discrete anchor sinks + 3-chart-type curricular mattang-meddo-rebbelib + personal-key e_id per-model + sense-feel low-frequency 1-in-N consult.
content_words: pre-voyage compile chart-embedding internalize sparse-attention prior
K-4-ocean-swell tier hierarchy backbone secondary tertiary quaternary
island-anchor shell discrete reference attention sink salient
marshall rebbelib stick chart Polynesian wayfinding
ocean swell rilib kaelib bungdockerik bundockeing

results.name: E2P Embedding-to-Prefix Personalization
results.rationale: Shared personal-embedding interpretation (personal-key e_id analog); lacks hierarchical tiers + curricular chart progression.

results.name: Prefix-Tuning Soft Prompt
results.rationale: Continuous prefix at inference resembles pre-voyage compile prepend; no tier hierarchy + no anchors + no curriculum.

results.name: H-MEM 4-Layer Hierarchical
results.rationale: Direct 4-tier hierarchy match (backbone/secondary/tertiary/quaternary parallels H-MEM); lacks pre-voyage compile-once + island anchors + 3-chart curriculum.

results.name: MACLA Procedural
results.rationale: Hierarchical procedural memory + curricular abstraction echo mattang->rebbelib; differs in pre-compile embedding.

results.name: MemGPT Tiered
results.rationale: Tiered memory with sparse paging parallels low-freq consult; missing 4-tier swell specificity + personal-key.

results.name: MIRIX Multi-Agent
results.rationale: Multi-agent memory orchestration orthogonal; weak overlap.

results.name: LEGOMem Modular
results.rationale: Modular procedural blocks parallel swappable chart-types + personal-key composability; lacks pre-voyage compile-once + ocean-swell tiering.

results.name: LLM Agent Memory Evolution Survey
results.rationale: Survey covers tiered/hierarchical/procedural memory taxonomy; no direct prior-art match.

decision_rationale: H-MEM 4-layer hierarchy alone crosses threshold (sem 0.80 / func 0.78); per total_hits>=1 -> FAIL. Primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.90 / func 0.78-0.92; verifier and primary agree on FAIL at lower count.
